attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
ST.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID,
ST.SUBSCRIPTION_ID,
ST.STATUS,
ST.INITIAL_TERM,
ST.RENEWAL_TERM,
ST.PREPAYMENT_TERM,
ST.RENEWAL_COUNTER,
ST.BDOM,
ST.TERM_START_DATE,
ST.TERM_END_DATE,
ST.OFFER_TYPE,
ST.BILLING_MODEL,
ST.LINE_STATUS,
ST.LAST_ORDER_TYPE,
ST.CURRENCY_CODE,
ST.PRODUCT_ID,
ST.TSV_AMOUNT,
ST.CREATION_DATE,
ST.LAST_MODIFIED_DATE,
ST.CANCEL_DATE,
ST.CHARGE_TYPE,
ST.OFFER_CODE,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE,
ST.UNBILLED_REV_LOCAL_AMT,
COALESCE(ST.FLEXUP_SKU,'N') AS FLEX_UP_RESV_LINE_FLG  /* Added as part of Athena Sep release */
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CISCO_SUBSCR_TSV_DATA_V ST
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID=ST.PRODUCT_ID 
WHERE NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV WTSV WHERE 
WTSV.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID=ST.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID AND WTSV.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM=ST.SUBSCRIPTION_ID AND NP.ITEM_KEY=WTSV.PRODUCT_KEY
AND WTSV.FLEX_UP_RESV_LINE_FLG = ST.FLEXUP_SKU)

SELECT RANK() OVER(ORDER BY TSV.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID,TSV.SUBSCRIPTION_ID,NP.ITEM_KEY) + SMTSVMAXKEY.MAX_VAL AS SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY,
TSV.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID AS SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID,
TSV.SUBSCRIPTION_ID AS BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM,
NP.ITEM_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
TSV.FLEXUP_SKU as FLEX_UP_RESV_LINE_FLG  /*Athena Sep release */
FROM (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SMTSVSBP.SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY),0) MAX_VAL 
FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV SMTSVSBP)SMTSVMAXKEY,
$$STGDB.ST_CISCO_SUBSCR_TSV_DATA_V TSV
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID=TSV.PRODUCT_ID
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV SM_TSV
WHERE TSV.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID=SM_TSV.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID
AND TSV.SUBSCRIPTION_ID=SM_TSV.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM
AND NP.ITEM_KEY=SM_TSV.PRODUCT_KEY
AND TSV.FLEXUP_SKU = SM_TSV.FLEX_UP_RESV_LINE_FLG)

SELECT 
SM.SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY AS SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY,
ST.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID	AS SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID,
ST.SUBSCRIPTION_ID	AS BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM,
NP.ITEM_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY,
COALESCE(ST.STATUS,'UNKNOWN') AS SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD,
COALESCE(ST.INITIAL_TERM,0) AS INITIAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT,
COALESCE(ST.RENEWAL_TERM,0) AS RENEWAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT,
COALESCE(ST.PREPAYMENT_TERM,0)	AS PREPAID_TERM_MTHS_CNT,
COALESCE(ST.RENEWAL_COUNTER,0) AS RENEWAL_CNT,
ST.BDOM	AS BILLED_DAY_OF_THE_MTH_INT,
ST.TERM_START_DATE	AS TERM_START_DTM,
ST.TERM_END_DATE	AS TERM_END_DTM,
COALESCE(ST.OFFER_TYPE,'UNKNOWN')	AS OFFER_TYPE_CD,
ST.BILLING_MODEL	AS BILLING_MODEL_NAME,
ST.LINE_STATUS	AS SUBSCR_LINE_STATUS_CD,
COALESCE(ST.LAST_ORDER_TYPE,'UNKNOWN')	AS SALES_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(ST.CURRENCY_CODE,'UNK')	AS BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CD,
ST.TSV_AMOUNT	AS TSV_LOCAL_AMT,
ST.CREATION_DATE	AS SRC_CREATION_DTM,
ST.LAST_MODIFIED_DATE	AS SRC_LAST_UPDATED_DTM,
ST.CANCEL_DATE AS SRC_CANCEL_DTM,
ST.CHARGE_TYPE AS CHARGE_TYPE_CODE,
COALESCE(ST.OFFER_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS ATO_NAME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'=' AS DML_TYPE,
ST.UNBILLED_REV_LOCAL_AMT,
COALESCE(ST.FLEXUP_SKU,'N') AS FLEX_UP_RESV_LINE_FLG /*Athena Sep release */
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CISCO_SUBSCR_TSV_DATA_V ST
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON (NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID=ST.PRODUCT_ID)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV SM
ON (ST.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID=SM.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID AND ST.SUBSCRIPTION_ID=SM.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM AND NP.ITEM_KEY=SM.PRODUCT_KEY
AND ST.FLEXUP_SKU = SM.FLEX_UP_RESV_LINE_FLG)

UNION ALL

SELECT 
SM.SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY AS SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY,
EX.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID	AS SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID,
EX.SUBSCRIPTION_ID	AS BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM,
NP.ITEM_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY,
COALESCE(EX.STATUS,'UNKNOWN') AS SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD,
COALESCE(EX.INITIAL_TERM,0) AS INITIAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT,
COALESCE(EX.RENEWAL_TERM,0) AS RENEWAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT,
COALESCE(EX.PREPAYMENT_TERM,0)	AS PREPAID_TERM_MTHS_CNT,
COALESCE(EX.RENEWAL_COUNTER,0) AS RENEWAL_CNT,
EX.BDOM	AS BILLED_DAY_OF_THE_MTH_INT,
EX.TERM_START_DATE	AS TERM_START_DTM,
EX.TERM_END_DATE	AS TERM_END_DTM,
COALESCE(EX.OFFER_TYPE,'UNKNOWN')	AS OFFER_TYPE_CD,
EX.BILLING_MODEL	AS BILLING_MODEL_NAME,
EX.LINE_STATUS	AS SUBSCR_LINE_STATUS_CD,
COALESCE(EX.LAST_ORDER_TYPE,'UNKNOWN')	AS SALES_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(EX.CURRENCY_CODE,'UNK')	AS BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CD,
EX.TSV_AMOUNT	AS TSV_LOCAL_AMT,
EX.CREATION_DATE	AS SRC_CREATION_DTM,
EX.LAST_MODIFIED_DATE	AS SRC_LAST_UPDATED_DTM,
EX.CANCEL_DATE AS SRC_CANCEL_DTM,
EX.CHARGE_TYPE AS CHARGE_TYPE_CD,
EX.OFFER_CODE AS ATO_NAME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'=' AS DML_TYPE,
EX.UNBILLED_REV_LOCAL_AMT,
COALESCE(EX.FLEXUP_SKU,'N') AS FLEX_UP_RESV_LINE_FLG /*Athena Sep release */
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_CISCO_SUBSCR_TSV_DATA_V EX
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON (NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID=EX.PRODUCT_ID)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV SM
ON (EX.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID=SM.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID AND EX.SUBSCRIPTION_ID=SM.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM AND NP.ITEM_KEY=SM.PRODUCT_KEY
AND EX.FLEXUP_SKU = SM.FLEX_UP_RESV_LINE_FLG)
AND NOT EXISTS 
(SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CISCO_SUBSCR_TSV_DATA_V ST WHERE 
ST.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID=EX.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID AND ST.SUBSCRIPTION_ID=EX.SUBSCRIPTION_ID AND ST.PRODUCT_ID=EX.PRODUCT_ID
AND ST.FLEXUP_SKU = EX.FLEXUP_SKU)
